description_long: This is a Makita-branded cordless electric drill, featuring a robust, ergonomic handle with a textured grip for secure handling. The body is primarily composed of blue and gray plastic with black accents, and the Makita logo is prominently displayed on the side. The drill is equipped with a large, detachable battery pack at the base, which is labeled with technical information and branding. The front of the drill has a metallic chuck, currently without a drill bit attached, and the head is reinforced with a darker, rubberized material for durability. Several ventilation slots are visible on the sides and rear of the drill, aiding in heat dissipation during use. The trigger button and additional control buttons are integrated into the handle area, providing easy access for operation.
description: A blue and gray Makita cordless electric drill with a textured grip, visible battery pack, and metallic chuck, featuring prominent branding and ventilation slots.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metallic chuck, central handle, and battery pack base.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the Makita logo, trigger button, battery pack, and ventilation slots.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the handle, battery pack, and rear ventilation slots.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing technical labels, battery pack, and additional ventilation slots.
